text: During a shipboard fire emergency, what is the primary purpose of the muster list?

options.text: A) To account for all personnel and passengers
B) To provide instructions for firefighting techniques
D) To identify the location of fire hydrants

explanation: The muster list, as per SOLAS, is a crucial document detailing duties for crew members in various emergencies, including fire. Its primary purpose during an emergency muster is to ensure all personnel and passengers are accounted for and to verify their safety and assigned roles.
